productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Brown Check Shirt
description: Style NoteRefresh your casual-ready portfolio with this indian terrain shirt. The precisely created premium shirt with trim lines, exclusive tailoring and soft fabric is designed to ensure you look your best even on the weekendsProduct DetailsBrown, blue and white checked shirt that has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, yoke at the back, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
